title: Analytics - Logout Initiated
scenario: Verify that after a user logs out, the Firebase dashboard displays all default and additional event elements with updated event counts after a few hours.
steps: Wait for a few hours for event counts to update.
Navigate to the Firebase dashboard page for this event.
Observe the default elements displayed: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by Country, event count by Gender, events per session, App Version, App build, and App Environment.
Check for additional elements: Screen name, User Type, and Action.
Verify that the event count for related elements has increased after the logout.
expected: The Firebase dashboard displays all default elements (graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by Country, event count by Gender, events per session, App Version, App build, App Environment) and additional elements (Screen name, User Type, Action). The event count for related elements increases after the user logs out.
